nodes.name: 01 - Webhook Ingress Production
nodes.notes: Entrada de producao via webhook. Placeholders de autenticacao esperados: X-API-Key, Authorization Bearer e HMAC Signature.

nodes.name: 00 - Manual Trigger Replay
nodes.notes: Inicio manual de replay. Workflow permanece inativo e sem gatilho externo.

parameters.jsCode: const incoming = items[0]?.json ?? {}; const hasIncomingPayload = Object.keys(incoming).length > 0 && Object.keys(incoming).some((key) => key !== 'executionMode'); const payload = incoming.payload ?? incoming.body ?? incoming ?? {}; const executionId = 'exec-' + Date.now(); const traceId = payload.trace_id || 'trace-missing'; const caseId = payload.case_id || 'case-missing'; return [{ json: { payload, workflow_context: { workflow_mode: 'production_ready', environment: 'production', source: hasIncomingPayload ? 'incoming_payload' : 'manual_trigger_empty_payload', generated_at: new Date().toISOString(), workflow_name: 'SOC-Octopus-Agent - IOC Externo Production', workflow_version: '1.0.0', observability: { started_at_ms: Date.now(), execution_id: executionId, correlation_id: [caseId, traceId].join(':'), trace_id: traceId }, auth_placeholders: { x_api_key: incoming.headers?.['x-api-key'] ?? '{{X-API-Key}}', authorization_bearer: incoming.headers?.authorization ?? '{{Authorization Bearer}}', hmac_signature: incoming.headers?.['x-hmac-signature'] ?? '{{HMAC Signature}}' } }, security_controls: { external_calls_allowed: false, remediation_allowed: false, credentials_allowed: false, production_allowed: false, production_changes_allowed: false, human_approval_required: true } } }];

nodes.name: 02 - Receber IOC Externo Production
nodes.notes: Recebe payload do webhook ou replay manual e prepara contexto de execucao.

parameters.jsCode: function text(value) { return value === undefined || value === null ? '' : String(value).trim(); } function lower(value) { return text(value).toLowerCase(); } function bool(value) { return value === true || value === 'true'; } function parseSummary(summary) { const entities = {}; for (const part of text(summary).split(';')) { const pieces = part.split('='); const key = text(pieces.shift()); const value = text(pieces.join('=')); if (key && value) entities[key] = value; } return entities; } function splitList(value) { if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.map(text).filter(Boolean); return text(value).split(/[;,]/).map(text).filter(Boolean); } function parseIndicators(payload, entities) { const domains = splitList(payload.domains || payload.domain || entities.domain); const ips = splitList(payload.ips || payload.ip || payload.source_ip || entities.source_ip).concat(splitList(payload.destination_ip || entities.destination_ip)); const hashes = splitList(payload.hashes || payload.file_hash || entities.hash); return { domains: [...new Set(domains)], ips: [...new Set(ips)], hashes: [...new Set(hashes)] }; } return items.map((item) => { const payload = item.json.payload ?? {}; const entities = payload.entities && typeof payload.entities === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.entities) ? payload.entities : parseSummary(payload.entities_summary); const indicators = parseIndicators(payload, entities); const evidence = splitList(payload.evidence || payload.evidence_summary); const normalized = { case_id: text(payload.case_id), trace_id: text(payload.trace_id), input_type: lower(payload.input_type), source_system: text(payload.source_system), received_at: text(payload.received_at), severity: lower(payload.severity), title: text(payload.title), description: text(payload.description), classification_hint: lower(payload.classification_hint), entities, indicators, evidence, flags: { synthetic_payload: bool(payload.synthetic_payload), contains_real_customer_data: bool(payload.contains_real_customer_data), contains_credentials: bool(payload.contains_credentials), human_approval_required_for_action: bool(payload.human_approval_required_for_action) } }; return { json: { ...item.json, normalized, processing_stage: 'normalization', normalization_status: 'completed' } }; });

nodes.name: 03 - Normalizar Payload
nodes.notes: Normaliza campos, entidades, indicadores e evidencias sem consulta externa.

parameters.jsCode: const allowedInputTypes = new Set(['soc_alert', 'event', 'ticket']); const allowedSeverities = new Set(['low', 'medium', 'high', 'critical']); const requiredFields = ['case_id', 'trace_id', 'input_type', 'severity', 'title', 'description']; return items.map((item) => { const normalized = item.json.normalized ?? {}; const flags = normalized.flags ?? {}; const indicators = normalized.indicators ?? {}; const missing_fields = requiredFields.filter((field) => !normalized[field]); const invalid_fields = []; if (normalized.input_type && !allowedInputTypes.has(normalized.input_type)) invalid_fields.push('input_type'); if (normalized.severity && !allowedSeverities.has(normalized.severity)) invalid_fields.push('severity'); const indicatorCount = (indicators.domains ?? []).length + (indicators.ips ?? []).length + (indicators.hashes ?? []).length; if (indicatorCount === 0) invalid_fields.push('indicators'); const controls = item.json.security_controls ?? {}; const security_violations = []; if (flags.contains_real_customer_data) security_violations.push('contains_real_customer_data'); if (flags.contains_credentials) security_violations.push('contains_credentials'); if (controls.external_calls_allowed) security_violations.push('external_calls_allowed'); if (controls.credentials_allowed) security_violations.push('credentials_allowed'); if (controls.production_allowed) security_violations.push('production_allowed'); if (controls.remediation_allowed) security_violations.push('remediation_allowed'); if (controls.database_allowed) security_violations.push('database_allowed'); if (controls.redis_allowed) security_violations.push('redis_allowed'); const is_valid = missing_fields.length === 0 && invalid_fields.length === 0 && security_violations.length === 0; return { json: { ...item.json, processing_stage: 'validation', validation: { is_valid, status: is_valid ? 'valid' : 'invalid', required_fields: requiredFields, missing_fields, invalid_fields, security_violations, indicator_count: indicatorCount, validation_notes: is_valid ? 'Payload IOC externo aceito para producao controlada.' : 'Payload bloqueado antes de classificacao.' } } }; });

nodes.name: 04 - Validar Campos Obrigatorios
nodes.notes: Valida campos minimos, indicadores e controles de seguranca.

nodes.name: 05 - Entrada Valida?
nodes.notes: Separa entrada valida de rejeicao controlada.

parameters.jsCode: return items.map((item) => { const normalized = item.json.normalized ?? {}; const validation = item.json.validation ?? {}; return { json: { ...item.json, processing_stage: 'controlled_rejection', controlled_rejection: { rejected: true, reason: 'Payload IOC externo invalido ou bloqueado por controles de seguranca.', missing_fields: validation.missing_fields ?? [], invalid_fields: validation.invalid_fields ?? [], security_violations: validation.security_violations ?? [], case_id: normalized.case_id || 'not_available', trace_id: normalized.trace_id || 'not_available', next_action: 'Corrigir payload e reexecutar manualmente em ambiente controlado.', automated_action_executed: false } } }; });

nodes.name: 05.1 - Rejeicao Controlada
nodes.notes: Trata entrada invalida sem executar acao externa.

parameters.jsCode: function includesAny(text, terms) { return terms.some((term) => text.includes(term)); } function riskFromSeverity(severity, indicatorCount) { if (severity === 'critical') return 'critical'; if (severity === 'high') return 'high'; if (severity === 'medium' && indicatorCount > 1) return 'high'; if (severity === 'medium') return 'medium'; return 'low'; } const routeTerms = [ { route: 'external_threat', terms: ['external_threat', 'ioc externo', 'malicious', 'ameaca externa', 'threat intel', 'comprometimento'] }, { route: 'reputation_gap', terms: ['sem reputacao', 'reputacao insuficiente', 'sem consulta externa', 'sem enriquecimento', 'unknown reputation'] }, { route: 'network_indicator', terms: ['conexao', 'dns', 'proxy', 'firewall', 'rede', 'egress', 'saida', 'destination_ip'] }, { route: 'false_positive', terms: ['falso positivo', 'allowlist', 'manutencao', 'teste aprovado', 'benigno'] } ]; const specialistsByRoute = { external_threat: ['threat_intelligence', 'rede', 'consolidador'], reputation_gap: ['reputacao_insuficiente', 'consolidador'], network_indicator: ['rede', 'consolidador'], false_positive: ['triagem_falso_positivo', 'consolidador'], unknown: ['triagem_soc', 'consolidador'] }; return items.map((item) => { const normalized = item.json.normalized ?? {}; const indicators = normalized.indicators ?? {}; const indicatorCount = (indicators.domains ?? []).length + (indicators.ips ?? []).length + (indicators.hashes ?? []).length; const corpus = [normalized.classification_hint, normalized.title, normalized.description, JSON.stringify(normalized.entities ?? {}), JSON.stringify(indicators), (normalized.evidence ?? []).join(' ')].join(' ').toLowerCase(); let probable_root_cause = 'unknown'; let confidence_level = 'low'; let classification_reason = 'Nenhuma regra local identificou rota especifica para o IOC.'; const directRoutes = new Set(['external_threat', 'reputation_gap', 'network_indicator', 'false_positive', 'unknown']); if (directRoutes.has(normalized.classification_hint)) { probable_root_cause = normalized.classification_hint; confidence_level = probable_root_cause === 'unknown' ? 'low' : 'high'; classification_reason = 'classification_hint indicou rota ' + probable_root_cause + '.'; } else { const matched = routeTerms.find((rule) => includesAny(corpus, rule.terms)); if (matched) { probable_root_cause = matched.route; confidence_level = 'medium'; classification_reason = 'Regras locais identificaram contexto ' + matched.route + '.'; } else if (indicatorCount > 0) { probable_root_cause = 'external_threat'; confidence_level = 'medium'; classification_reason = 'Indicadores externos presentes sem sinal forte de falso positivo.'; } } const risk_level = riskFromSeverity(normalized.severity, indicatorCount); const possible_false_positive = probable_root_cause === 'false_positive' || probable_root_cause === 'reputation_gap'; return { json: { ...item.json, processing_stage: 'classification', classification: { probable_root_cause, routing_key: probable_root_cause, risk_level, confidence_level, classification_reason, false_positive_assessment: possible_false_positive ? 'possible' : 'not_indicated_by_lab_rules', possible_false_positive, specialists_recommended: specialistsByRoute[probable_root_cause] ?? specialistsByRoute.unknown } } }; });

nodes.name: 06 - Classificar IOC Externo
nodes.notes: Classifica deterministica e localmente o IOC externo.

nodes.name: 07 - Switch Roteamento IOC
nodes.notes: Roteia IOC externo para especialistas locais sem chamadas externas.

parameters.jsCode: return items.map((item) => { const normalized = item.json.normalized ?? {}; const indicators = normalized.indicators ?? {}; return { json: { ...item.json, processing_stage: 'external_threat_specialist', specialist_analysis: { specialist: 'threat_intelligence', diagnosis: 'IOC externo com sinais suficientes para tratamento como suspeita de ameaca externa em producao controlada.', evidence_considered: normalized.evidence ?? [], affected_entities: { domains: indicators.domains ?? [], ips: indicators.ips ?? [], hashes: indicators.hashes ?? [] }, recommendation: 'Manter IOC em revisao humana e preparar enriquecimento seguro futuro antes de qualquer bloqueio.', technical_steps: ['Registrar indicadores normalizados no caso.', 'Correlacionar dominio, IP e hash com eventos internos somente leitura quando disponivel.', 'Verificar se ha contexto de allowlist ou teste aprovado.', 'Submeter qualquer bloqueio ou contencao para aprovacao humana.'], escalation: 'Escalonar para Threat Intelligence e SOC se houver recorrencia ou multiplos ativos afetados.', critical_actions_need_approval: ['bloqueio_de_dominio', 'bloqueio_de_ip', 'bloqueio_de_hash', 'alteracao_de_regra_de_rede'], remediation_allowed: false, route_confirmed: true } } }; });

nodes.name: 08 - Especialista Threat Intel
nodes.notes: Analise local de ameaca externa sem OSINT real e sem API externa.

parameters.jsCode: return items.map((item) => { const normalized = item.json.normalized ?? {}; return { json: { ...item.json, processing_stage: 'reputation_gap_specialist', specialist_analysis: { specialist: 'reputation_gap', diagnosis: 'Indicador externo sem reputacao confiavel disponivel no fluxo de producao controlada.', evidence_considered: normalized.evidence ?? [], affected_entities: normalized.indicators ?? {}, recommendation: 'Nao bloquear indicadores apenas por ausencia de reputacao. Registrar lacuna de enriquecimento e manter revisao humana.', technical_steps: ['Confirmar que nenhuma consulta externa foi executada.', 'Documentar quais indicadores precisam de enriquecimento futuro.', 'Priorizar correlacao com eventos internos somente leitura.', 'Manter confianca limitada ate fonte de reputacao ser configurada com seguranca.'], escalation: 'Escalonar para analista SOC se o caso exigir decisao antes do enriquecimento.', critical_actions_need_approval: ['bloqueio_de_indicador', 'atualizacao_de_lista_de_bloqueio', 'notificacao_externa'], remediation_allowed: false, route_confirmed: true } } }; });

nodes.name: 08.1 - Especialista Reputacao Insuficiente
nodes.notes: Trata lacuna de reputacao sem consultar fontes externas.

parameters.jsCode: return items.map((item) => { const normalized = item.json.normalized ?? {}; const entities = normalized.entities ?? {}; const indicators = normalized.indicators ?? {}; return { json: { ...item.json, processing_stage: 'network_indicator_specialist', specialist_analysis: { specialist: 'network_indicator', diagnosis: 'IOC externo observado em contexto de conexao de rede controlada.', evidence_considered: normalized.evidence ?? [], affected_entities: { source_ip: entities.source_ip || 'origem_nao_informada', destination_ip: entities.destination_ip || 'destino_nao_informado', domains: indicators.domains ?? [], ips: indicators.ips ?? [] }, recommendation: 'Revisar contexto de rede em modo somente leitura e nao alterar regras sem aprovacao humana.', technical_steps: ['Correlacionar origem, destino e dominio em logs internos.', 'Verificar se o trafego corresponde a teste ou manutencao aprovada.', 'Avaliar impacto potencial de bloqueio sem executar mudanca.', 'Encaminhar decisao de bloqueio para aprovacao humana.'], escalation: 'Escalonar para equipe de Rede se houver indicio de comunicacao recorrente ou lateralidade.', critical_actions_need_approval: ['bloqueio_de_ip', 'bloqueio_de_dominio', 'alteracao_de_regra_firewall', 'alteracao_de_proxy'], remediation_allowed: false, route_confirmed: true } } }; });

nodes.name: 08.2 - Especialista Rede IOC
nodes.notes: Analise local de rede sem firewall real, proxy real ou mudanca operacional.

parameters.jsCode: return items.map((item) => { const normalized = item.json.normalized ?? {}; return { json: { ...item.json, processing_stage: 'false_positive_specialist', specialist_analysis: { specialist: 'false_positive', diagnosis: 'Contexto indica possivel falso positivo ou indicador benigno em producao controlada.', evidence_considered: normalized.evidence ?? [], affected_entities: normalized.indicators ?? {}, recommendation: 'Manter o caso revisavel e exigir evidencia humana antes de encerrar como falso positivo.', technical_steps: ['Validar se existe allowlist ou janela de teste aprovada.', 'Confirmar proprietario do teste ou da manutencao.', 'Registrar motivo do possivel falso positivo.', 'Nao suprimir regra nem adicionar allowlist automaticamente.'], escalation: 'Escalonar para analista SOC responsavel pela triagem de falso positivo.', critical_actions_need_approval: ['encerramento_de_alerta', 'allowlist_de_indicador', 'supressao_de_regra'], remediation_allowed: false, route_confirmed: true } } }; });

nodes.name: 08.3 - Especialista Falso Positivo
nodes.notes: Analise local de possivel falso positivo sem supressao automatica.

parameters.jsCode: return items.map((item) => { const normalized = item.json.normalized ?? {}; return { json: { ...item.json, processing_stage: 'unknown_specialist', specialist_analysis: { specialist: 'unknown', diagnosis: 'IOC externo nao roteado por regra local especifica.', evidence_considered: normalized.evidence ?? [], affected_entities: normalized.indicators ?? {}, recommendation: 'Manter revisao humana e coletar contexto adicional antes de decisao.', technical_steps: ['Revisar payload normalizado e indicadores extraidos.', 'Solicitar contexto adicional ao solicitante ou analista.', 'Reexecutar com classification_hint especifico se apropriado.', 'Nao executar remediacao automatica.'], escalation: 'Escalonar para triagem SOC humana.', critical_actions_need_approval: ['qualquer_acao_critica'], remediation_allowed: false, route_confirmed: true } } }; });

nodes.name: 08.4 - Especialista Unknown
nodes.notes: Fallback seguro para classificacao desconhecida.

parameters.jsCode: return items.map((item) => { const normalized = item.json.normalized ?? {}; const validation = item.json.validation ?? { is_valid: false, status: 'invalid' }; const rejection = item.json.controlled_rejection ?? null; const classification = item.json.classification ?? { probable_root_cause: rejection ? 'not_classified' : 'unknown', risk_level: 'unknown', confidence_level: 'low', classification_reason: rejection ? 'Classificacao nao executada por rejeicao controlada.' : 'Classificacao nao disponivel.' }; const specialist = item.json.specialist_analysis ?? null; const controls = item.json.security_controls ?? {}; const blocked = rejection?.rejected === true || validation.is_valid !== true; const status = blocked ? 'rejected_invalid_payload' : 'analysis_completed_prod'; const diagnosis = blocked ? rejection?.reason : (specialist?.diagnosis ?? 'Diagnostico especializado nao produzido.'); const solution_recommendation = blocked ? (rejection?.next_action ?? 'Corrigir payload antes de nova execucao.') : (specialist?.recommendation ?? 'Revisao humana obrigatoria.'); const output = { execution_id: normalized.observability?.execution_id || 'exec-' + Date.now(), workflow_name: item.json.workflow_context?.workflow_name || 'SOC-Octopus-Agent - IOC Externo Production', workflow_version: item.json.workflow_context?.workflow_version || '1.0.0', correlation_id: item.json.workflow_context?.observability?.correlation_id || [normalized.case_id || 'case-missing', normalized.trace_id || 'trace-missing'].join(':'), trace_id: normalized.trace_id || rejection?.trace_id || 'not_available', case_id: normalized.case_id || rejection?.case_id || 'not_available', status, execution_status: status, input_type: normalized.input_type || 'not_available', severity: normalized.severity || 'not_available', probable_root_cause: classification.probable_root_cause, risk_level: classification.risk_level, risk_score: classification.risk_score, confidence_level: classification.confidence_level, confidence_score: classification.confidence_score, diagnosis, solution_recommendation, technical_steps: specialist?.technical_steps ?? [], escalation: specialist?.escalation ?? 'Revisao humana obrigatoria antes de qualquer acao.', observability: { execution_id: normalized.observability?.execution_id || 'exec-' + Date.now(), workflow_version: item.json.workflow_context?.workflow_version || '1.0.0', processing_time_ms: Math.max(0, Date.now() - (item.json.workflow_context?.observability?.started_at_ms || Date.now())), correlation_id: item.json.workflow_context?.observability?.correlation_id || [normalized.case_id || 'case-missing', normalized.trace_id || 'trace-missing'].join(':'), trace_id: normalized.trace_id || 'not_available' }, audit_timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), audit_summary: 'Workflow production ready para IOC externo; auditoria preparada para persistencia, SIEM sync, ticketing, cache e aprovacao humana.', human_approval: { required: true, required_for_actions: specialist?.critical_actions_need_approval ?? [], approval_status: 'pending_human_review' }, security_notes: { external_calls_allowed: controls.external_calls_allowed === true, remediation_allowed: controls.remediation_allowed === true, credentials_allowed: controls.credentials_allowed === true, production_allowed: controls.production_allowed === true, production_changes_allowed: controls.production_changes_allowed === false, human_approval_required: true, automated_action_executed: false }, validation, rejection, classification, specialist_analysis: specialist, integration_targets: { threat_intel: process.env.THREAT_INTEL_BASE_URL ? 'configured_by_env' : 'needs_env', siem: process.env.SIEM_BASE_URL ? 'configured_by_env' : 'needs_env', ticketing: process.env.TICKETING_BASE_URL ? 'configured_by_env' : 'needs_env', postgres: 'configured_by_credential', redis: 'configured_by_credential' } }; return { json: { case_id: output.case_id, trace_id: output.trace_id, output_ready_for_human_review: true, soc_octopus_output: output } }; });
